title: Weekly Brief
summary: The launch stabilized after two routing fixes. Conversion improved and support volume stayed flat.

content.title: Growth
content.text: New activation flow lifted completion rate in the main onboarding segment.

content.title: Quality
content.text: Latency stayed within the target range after the cache warmup change.

content.title: Risk
content.text: One provider remains noisy and should stay behind fallback routing.

content.title: Next
content.text: Ship the retry dashboard and review the alert thresholds on Monday.
